# clearpass_enforcement_profile (Data Source)

Retrieves the details of a specific Enforcement Profile in ClearPass by its ID or Name. Enforcement profiles define the actions to be taken when a policy rule is matched, such as returning RADIUS attributes, assigning a VLAN, or redirecting a user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example for fetching a single enforcement profile by name
data "clearpass_enforcement_profile" "employee_access" {
  name = "Employee-Access-Profile"
}

output "employee_profile_action" {
  description = "The action taken by the employee profile"
  value       = data.clearpass_enforcement_profile.employee_access.action
}

# Example for fetching a single enforcement profile by ID
data "clearpass_enforcement_profile" "guest_access" {
  id = 123
}

output "guest_profile_type" {
  description = "The type of the guest profile"
  value       = data.clearpass_enforcement_profile.guest_access.type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the Enforcement Profile to retrieve. Must specify either `id` or `name`.
- `name` (String) The exact name of the Enforcement Profile to retrieve (e.g., 'Employee-Access-Profile'). Must specify either `id` or `name`.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String) The action to take when the profile is applied (e.g., 'Accept', 'Reject', 'Drop'). Primarily used for RADIUS profiles.
- `agent_template` (String) Template for Agent enforcement profiles (e.g., 'Agent', 'AgentScript').
- `attributes` (Attributes List) A list of attributes returned or applied by this profile. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attributes))
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the Enforcement Profile.
- `device_group_list` (List of String) A list of device groups associated with this profile.
- `post_auth_template` (String) Template for Post-Authentication enforcement profiles (e.g., 'EntityUpdate', 'SessionRestriction', 'SessionNotify').
- `radius_dyn_authz_template` (String) Template for RADIUS Dynamic Authorization.
- `type` (String) The type of enforcement profile (e.g., 'RADIUS', 'TACACS', 'Agent', 'Aruba_DUR').

<a id="nestedatt--attributes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attributes`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The specific name of the attribute (e.g., 'Filter-Id', 'Tunnel-Type').
- `type` (String) The type or category of the attribute (e.g., 'Radius:IETF', 'Radius:Cisco').
- `value` (String) The value assigned to the attribute.
